title: export_session data payload
description: v0.62.0 — Snapshot the in-process session ring buffer to ~/.cache/cuneiform-mcp/sessions/<iso-ts>.{json,md}. Every prior tool call's structuredContent envelope was captured by the ring buffer (capacity configurable via CUNEIFORM_MCP_SESSION_BUFFER, default 200). Returns the snapshot paths + envelope count + oldest/newest timestamps. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

path_json.description: Absolute filesystem path to the JSON snapshot. Preserves the full typed envelope (data + provenance + warnings) for every recorded tool call in chronological order.

path_md.description: Absolute filesystem path to the Markdown snapshot. One section per envelope with the rendered text block — human-readable handoff.

envelope_count.description: Number of envelopes in the snapshot.

buffer_capacity.description: Configured ring-buffer capacity (default 200, override via CUNEIFORM_MCP_SESSION_BUFFER).

oldest_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the oldest envelope in the snapshot. Null if buffer is empty.

newest_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the newest envelope in the snapshot. Null if buffer is empty.
